summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. The hydrated artifact covers 20 of 25 requested refs; those 20 are open PRs with no artifact security-sensitive signal and no shared canonical. Five requested refs are missing hydrated live state, so they are scoped needs_human items rather than close/merge candidates.
